title: Node Test Runner, Runtime Faults, Compile Rejections, Async Leaks, and CLI Tests · Type-System Trace: Pokedex Ts Compile Negative Evidence
summary: Tests cast fixtures, mock global fetch across files, assert only snapshots, omit compile-negative cases, leave timers and listeners active, and never execute emitted JavaScript. Predict the user decision, runtime value, strict type claim, promise state, API boundary, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex ts compile negative evidence increment in layered runtime and compile-time evidence harness. Learners progress throu…
